From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark
    DAG representation for a dependently typed calculus with inductives.
    Based on the term language from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Term size *)

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

(** ** Closedness *)

Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n
  | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C &&
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) brs
  end.

Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

(** ** DAG representation *)

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

(** ** Decidable equality on nodes (infrastructure — proved) *)

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

(** ** Interning: lookup-or-append *)

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

(** ** Sharing: tree → DAG *)

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

(** ** Unfolding: DAG → tree *)

Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x)
    | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with
        | Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nLam a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nApp t u) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with
        | Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nFix a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        match (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) args with
        | Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts)
        | None => None
        end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m,
              (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs)
        | _, _, _ => None
        end
    end
  end.

(** ** DAG-level substitution for closed terms *)

(** Substitute the DAG term at [u_idx] for variable [target] throughout the
    DAG term at [idx]. Under binders (Pi, Lam, Fix, Case motive), [target]
    is incremented. Because [u] is closed, its DAG node [u_idx] is valid at
    every binder depth without shifting. *)

Fixpoint dag_subst_closed
  (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat)
  : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx)
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) =>
        if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl
        else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in
        intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) =>
        let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in
        intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        let '(tbl1, args') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl args in
        intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl2 brs in
        intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end.

(** ** Infrastructure lemmas *)

Lemma find_index_spec : forall (f : node -> bool) tbl acc idx,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some idx ->
  idx >= acc /\
  exists n, nth_error tbl (idx - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; intros acc idx H.
  - simpl in H. discriminate.
  - simpl in H. destruct (f h) eqn:Efh.
    + injection H as <-. split. lia.
      exists h. replace (acc - acc) with 0 by lia. simpl. auto.
    + apply IH in H. destruct H as [Hge [n [Hn Hfn]]].
      split. lia.
      exists n. split; auto.
      replace (idx - acc) with (S (idx - S acc)) by lia.
      simpl. exact Hn.
Qed.

Lemma intern_idx_lt : forall n tbl tbl' idx,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  idx < length tbl'.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx H.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:Efind.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    apply find_index_spec in Efind.
    destruct Efind as [Hge [m [Hm _]]].
    rewrite Nat.sub_0_r in Hm.
    apply nth_error_Some. intro E. rewrite E in Hm. discriminate.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_length_ge : forall n tbl tbl' idx,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  length tbl <= length tbl'.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx H.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0).
  - injection H as <- <-. lia.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth_preserved : forall n tbl tbl' idx i,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  i < length tbl ->
  nth_error tbl' i = nth_error tbl i.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx i H Hi.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0).
  - injection H as <- <-. reflexivity.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    apply nth_error_app1. exact Hi.
Qed.

Lemma intern_idx_correct : forall n tbl tbl' idx,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  nth_error tbl' idx = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx H.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:Efind.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    apply find_index_spec in Efind.
    destruct Efind as [Hge [m [Hm Hfm]]].
    rewrite Nat.sub_0_r in Hm.
    apply node_eqb_eq in Hfm. subst. exact Hm.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    rewrite nth_error_app2 by lia.
    rewrite Nat.sub_diag. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** share_length_ge: share never shrinks the table *)
Lemma share_length_ge : forall t tbl tbl' idx,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  length tbl <= length tbl'.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H; simpl in H.
  all: try (eapply intern_length_ge; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - (* tRoll *)
    set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end)).
    destruct (go l tbl) eqn:E.
    eapply le_trans. 2: eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
    clear H. revert tbl d l0 E.
    induction l as [|a0 l IHl]; intros tbl0 d l0 E; simpl in E.
    + injection E as <- <-. lia.
    + destruct (share a0 tbl0) eqn:E1.
      destruct (go l d0) eqn:E2.
      injection E as <- <-.
      eapply le_trans. eapply IHt; eauto.
      eapply IHl; eauto.
  - (* tCase *)
    set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end)).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (go l d0) eqn:E3.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. 2: eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
    clear H. revert d0 d1 l0 E3.
    induction l as [|a0 l IHl]; intros tbl0 d1 l0 E; simpl in E.
    + injection E as <- <-. lia.
    + destruct (share a0 tbl0) eqn:E1.
      destruct (go l d2) eqn:E2.
      injection E as <- <-.
      eapply le_trans. eapply IHt; eauto.
      eapply IHl; eauto.
Qed.

(** share_idx_lt: the returned index is in bounds *)
Lemma share_idx_lt : forall t tbl tbl' idx,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  idx < length tbl'.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H; simpl in H.
  all: try (eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end) l tbl)) eqn:E.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
        match ts with
        | [] => (acc, [])
        | t0 :: rest =>
            let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
            let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
            (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
        end) l d0)) eqn:E3.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
Qed.

(** share preserves old entries *)
Lemma share_nth_preserved : forall t tbl tbl' idx i,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  i < length tbl ->
  nth_error tbl' i = nth_error tbl i.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx i Hs Hi; simpl in Hs.
  all: try (eapply intern_nth_preserved; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    erewrite intern_nth_preserved; eauto.
    erewrite IHt2; eauto. erewrite IHt1; eauto.
    eapply share_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    erewrite intern_nth_preserved; eauto.
    erewrite IHt2; eauto. erewrite IHt1; eauto.
    eapply share_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    erewrite intern_nth_preserved; eauto.
    erewrite IHt2; eauto. erewrite IHt1; eauto.
    eapply share_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    erewrite intern_nth_preserved; eauto.
    erewrite IHt2; eauto. erewrite IHt1; eauto.
    eapply share_length_ge; eauto.
  - set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end)).
    destruct (go l tbl) eqn:E.
    erewrite intern_nth_preserved; eauto.
    clear Hs. revert tbl d l0 E Hi.
    induction l as [|a0 l IHl]; intros tbl0 d l0 E Hi; simpl in E.
    + injection E as <- <-. reflexivity.
    + destruct (share a0 tbl0) eqn:E1.
      destruct (go l d0) eqn:E2.
      injection E as <- <-.
      erewrite IHl; eauto.
      eapply IHt; eauto.
      eapply share_length_ge; eauto.
  - set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end)).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (go l d0) eqn:E3.
    erewrite intern_nth_preserved; eauto.
    clear Hs. revert d0 d1 l0 E3.
    induction l as [|a0 l IHl]; intros tbl0 d1 l0 E; simpl in E.
    + injection E as <- <-. erewrite IHt2; eauto. erewrite IHt1; eauto.
      eapply share_length_ge; eauto.
    + destruct (share a0 tbl0) eqn:E1.
      destruct (go l d2) eqn:E2.
      injection E as <- <-.
      erewrite IHl; eauto.
      eapply IHt; eauto.
      eapply le_trans.
      eapply le_trans. exact Hi.
      eapply share_length_ge; eauto.
      eapply share_length_ge; eauto.
      exact Hi.
Qed.

(** unfold is monotone in fuel *)
Lemma unfold_fuel_mono : forall tbl fuel1 fuel2 idx t,
  fuel1 <= fuel2 ->
  unfold tbl fuel1 idx = Some t ->
  unfold tbl fuel2 idx = Some t.
Proof.
  intros tbl.
  induction fuel1; intros fuel2 idx t Hle H.
  - simpl in H. discriminate.
  - destruct fuel2; [lia|].
    simpl in H. simpl.
    destruct (nth_error tbl idx) eqn:En; [|discriminate].
    rewrite En.
    destruct n.
    all: try (exact H).
    + (* nPi *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      exact H.
    + (* nLam *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      exact H.
    + (* nApp *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      exact H.
    + (* nFix *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      exact H.
    + (* nRoll *)
      revert H. generalize l.
      fix IHl 1. intros [|i ls].
      * simpl. auto.
      * simpl.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 i) eqn:Eui; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
          match l0 with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel1 i0, go l' with
                        | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                        | _, _ => None
                        end
          end) ls) eqn:Egs; [|discriminate].
        intros H.
        erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
        erewrite IHl; eauto.
    + (* nCase *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      revert H. generalize l.
      fix IHl 1. intros [|i ls].
      * simpl. auto.
      * simpl.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 i) eqn:Eui; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
          match l0 with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel1 i0, go l' with
                        | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                        | _, _ => None
                        end
          end) ls) eqn:Egs; [|discriminate].
        intros H.
        erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
        erewrite IHl; eauto.
Qed.

(** unfold works with extended table *)
Lemma unfold_tbl_mono : forall tbl ext fuel idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
  unfold (tbl ++ ext) fuel idx = Some t.
Proof.
  intros tbl ext.
  induction fuel; intros idx t H.
  - simpl in H. discriminate.
  - simpl in H. simpl.
    destruct (nth_error tbl idx) eqn:En; [|discriminate].
    erewrite nth_error_app1.
    2: { apply nth_error_Some. intro E. rewrite E in En. discriminate. }
    rewrite En.
    destruct n.
    all: try exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto. exact H.
    + revert H. generalize l.
      fix IHl 1. intros [|i ls].
      * simpl. auto.
      * simpl.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) eqn:Eui; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
          match l0 with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
                        | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                        | _, _ => None
                        end
          end) ls) eqn:Egs; [|discriminate].
        intros H.
        erewrite IHfuel; eauto.
        erewrite IHl; eauto.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto.
      revert H. generalize l.
      fix IHl 1. intros [|i ls].
      * simpl. auto.
      * simpl.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) eqn:Eui; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
          match l0 with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
                        | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                        | _, _ => None
                        end
          end) ls) eqn:Egs; [|discriminate].
        intros H.
        erewrite IHfuel; eauto.
        erewrite IHl; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Main round-trip lemma:
    share t tbl0 = (tbl1, idx) ->
    unfold tbl2 (length tbl1) idx = Some t
    for any tbl2 extending tbl1. *)

Lemma share_unfold_gen : forall t tbl0 tbl1 idx,
  share t tbl0 = (tbl1, idx) ->
  unfold tbl1 (length tbl1) idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl0 tbl1 idx Hs; simpl in Hs.
  - (* tVar *)
    apply intern_idx_correct in Hs.
    destruct (length tbl1) eqn:Hl.
    + apply intern_idx_lt in Hs. unfold intern in Hs. destruct (find_index _ _ _).
      * injection Hs as <- <-. lia.
      * injection Hs as <- <-. rewrite app_length in *. simpl in *. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite Hs. reflexivity.
  - (* tSort *)
    apply intern_idx_correct in Hs.
    destruct (length tbl1) eqn:Hl.
    + apply intern_idx_lt in Hs. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite Hs. reflexivity.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl0) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    pose proof (intern_idx_correct _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hidx.
    pose proof (intern_idx_lt _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hlt.
    destruct (length tbl1) eqn:Hl. lia.
    simpl. rewrite Hidx.
    (* need unfold tbl1 n a = Some t1 and unfold tbl1 n n0 = Some t2 *)
    (* from IHt1: unfold d (length d) n1 = Some t1 *)
    pose proof (IHt1 _ _ _ E1) as IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 _ _ _ E2) as IH2.
    (* tbl1 extends d, which extends d0, which extends tbl0 *)
    (* intern extends tbl2 (= d0) by at most 1 *)
    pose proof (share_length_ge t1 tbl0 d n1 E1) as Hge1.
    pose proof (share_length_ge t2 d d0 n0 E2) as Hge2.
    pose proof (intern_length_ge _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hge3.
    (* unfold d (length d) n1 = Some t1 => unfold tbl1 (length d) n1 = Some t1 *)
    (* d is a prefix of tbl1 *)
    assert (exists ext1, tbl1 = d ++ ext1) as [ext1 ->].
    { unfold intern in Hs.
      destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi n1 n0)) d0 0).
      - injection Hs as <- <-. 
        assert (exists ext, d0 = d ++ ext) as [ext ->].
        { assert (exists ext, d0 = d ++ ext) by admit. exact H. }
        admit.
      - injection Hs as <- <-.
        admit. }
    admit.
  all: admit.
Admitted.

The admit approach is getting complex. Let me think differently. 

The key issue with `share_unfold_gen` is that I need to know the structural relationship between `tbl1` (result of share) and the intermediate tables. The cleanest approach is to prove a stronger induction hypothesis that talks about table extensions:

**Generalized statement**: For any table extension `ext`, if `share t tbl0 = (tbl1, idx)` and `tbl2 = tbl1 ++ ext`, then `unfold tbl2 fuel idx = Some t` where `fuel >= length tbl1`.

Let me restart with a cleaner, fully worked-out approach:

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark
    DAG representation for a dependently typed calculus with inductives.
    Based on the term language from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Term size *)

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

(** ** Closedness *)

Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n
  | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C &&
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) brs
  end.

Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

(** ** DAG representation *)

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

(** ** Decidable equality on nodes (infrastructure — proved) *)

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

(** ** Interning: lookup-or-append *)

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

(** ** Sharing: tree → DAG *)

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

(** ** Unfolding: DAG → tree *)

Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x)
    | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with
        | Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nLam a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nApp t u) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with
        | Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nFix a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        match (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) args with
        | Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts)
        | None => None
        end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m,
              (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs)
        | _, _, _ => None
        end
    end
  end.

(** ** DAG-level substitution for closed terms *)

Fixpoint dag_subst_closed
  (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat)
  : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx)
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) =>
        if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl
        else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in
        intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) =>
        let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in
        intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        let '(tbl1, args') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl args in
        intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl2 brs in
        intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end.

(** ** Infrastructure lemmas *)

Lemma find_index_spec : forall (f : node -> bool) tbl acc idx,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some idx ->
  idx >= acc /\
  exists n, nth_error tbl (idx - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; intros acc idx H.
  - simpl in H. discriminate.
  - simpl in H. destruct (f h) eqn:Efh.
    + injection H as <-. split. lia.
      exists h. replace (acc - acc) with 0 by lia. simpl. auto.
    + apply IH in H. destruct H as [Hge [n [Hn Hfn]]].
      split. lia.
      exists n. split; auto.
      replace (idx - acc) with (S (idx - S acc)) by lia.
      simpl. exact Hn.
Qed.

Lemma intern_idx_lt : forall n tbl tbl' idx,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  idx < length tbl'.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx H.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:Efind.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    apply find_index_spec in Efind.
    destruct Efind as [Hge [m [Hm _]]].
    rewrite Nat.sub_0_r in Hm.
    apply nth_error_Some. intro E. rewrite E in Hm. discriminate.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_length_ge : forall n tbl tbl' idx,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  length tbl <= length tbl'.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx H.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0).
  - injection H as <- <-. lia.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth_preserved : forall n tbl tbl' idx i,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  i < length tbl ->
  nth_error tbl' i = nth_error tbl i.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx i H Hi.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0).
  - injection H as <- <-. reflexivity.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    apply nth_error_app1. exact Hi.
Qed.

Lemma intern_idx_correct : forall n tbl tbl' idx,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  nth_error tbl' idx = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx H.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:Efind.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    apply find_index_spec in Efind.
    destruct Efind as [Hge [m [Hm Hfm]]].
    rewrite Nat.sub_0_r in Hm.
    apply node_eqb_eq in Hfm. subst. exact Hm.
  - injection H as <- <-.
    rewrite nth_error_app2 by lia.
    rewrite Nat.sub_diag. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma intern_is_prefix : forall n tbl tbl' idx,
  intern n tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  exists ext, tbl' = tbl ++ ext.
Proof.
  intros n tbl tbl' idx H.
  unfold intern in H.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0).
  - injection H as <- <-. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity.
  - injection H as <- <-. exists [n]. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** share_length_ge: share never shrinks the table *)
Lemma share_length_ge : forall t tbl tbl' idx,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  length tbl <= length tbl'.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H; simpl in H.
  all: try (eapply intern_length_ge; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - (* tRoll *)
    set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end)).
    destruct (go l tbl) eqn:E.
    eapply le_trans. 2: eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
    clear H. revert tbl d l0 E.
    induction l as [|a0 l IHl]; intros tbl0 d l0 E; simpl in E.
    + injection E as <- <-. lia.
    + destruct (share a0 tbl0) eqn:E1.
      destruct (go l d0) eqn:E2.
      injection E as <- <-.
      eapply le_trans. eapply IHt; eauto.
      eapply IHl; eauto.
  - (* tCase *)
    set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end)).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (go l d0) eqn:E3.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply le_trans. 2: eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
    clear H. revert d0 d1 l0 E3.
    induction l as [|a0 l IHl]; intros tbl0 d1 l0 E; simpl in E.
    + injection E as <- <-. lia.
    + destruct (share a0 tbl0) eqn:E1.
      destruct (go l d2) eqn:E2.
      injection E as <- <-.
      eapply le_trans. eapply IHt; eauto.
      eapply IHl; eauto.
Qed.

(** share produces a prefix of the result table starting from the input table *)
Lemma share_is_prefix : forall t tbl tbl' idx,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  exists ext, tbl' = tbl ++ ext.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H; simpl in H.
  all: try (eapply intern_is_prefix; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (IHt1 _ _ _ E1) as [e1 ->].
    destruct (IHt2 _ _ _ E2) as [e2 ->].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ H) as [e3 ->].
    exists (e1 ++ e2 ++ e3). rewrite !app_assoc. reflexivity.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (IHt1 _ _ _ E1) as [e1 ->].
    destruct (IHt2 _ _ _ E2) as [e2 ->].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ H) as [e3 ->].
    exists (e1 ++ e2 ++ e3). rewrite !app_assoc. reflexivity.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (IHt1 _ _ _ E1) as [e1 ->].
    destruct (IHt2 _ _ _ E2) as [e2 ->].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ H) as [e3 ->].
    exists (e1 ++ e2 ++ e3). rewrite !app_assoc. reflexivity.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (IHt1 _ _ _ E1) as [e1 ->].
    destruct (IHt2 _ _ _ E2) as [e2 ->].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ H) as [e3 ->].
    exists (e1 ++ e2 ++ e3). rewrite !app_assoc. reflexivity.
  - (* tRoll *)
    set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end)).
    destruct (go l tbl) eqn:E.
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ H) as [e ->].
    assert (exists ext, d = tbl ++ ext) as [ext ->].
    { clear H. revert tbl d l0 E.
      induction l as [|a0 l IHl]; intros tbl0 d l0 E; simpl in E.
      + injection E as <- <-. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity.
      + destruct (share a0 tbl0) eqn:E1.
        destruct (go l d0) eqn:E2.
        injection E as <- <-.
        destruct (IHt _ _ _ E1) as [e1 ->].
        destruct (IHl _ _ _ E2) as [e2 ->].
        exists (e1 ++ e2). rewrite app_assoc. reflexivity. }
    exists (ext ++ e). rewrite app_assoc. reflexivity.
  - (* tCase *)
    set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end)).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (go l d0) eqn:E3.
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ H) as [e ->].
    destruct (IHt1 _ _ _ E1) as [e1 ->].
    destruct (IHt2 _ _ _ E2) as [e2 ->].
    assert (exists ext, d1 = (tbl ++ e1) ++ e2 ++ ext) as [ext ->].
    { clear H. revert d0 d1 l0 E3.
      induction l as [|a0 l IHl]; intros tbl0 d1 l0 E; simpl in E.
      + injection E as <- <-. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity.
      + destruct (share a0 tbl0) eqn:E1.
        destruct (go l d2) eqn:E2.
        injection E as <- <-.
        destruct (IHt _ _ _ E1) as [e1' ->].
        destruct (IHl _ _ _ E2) as [e2' ->].
        exists (e1' ++ e2'). rewrite app_assoc. reflexivity. }
    exists (e1 ++ e2 ++ ext ++ e). rewrite !app_assoc. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** share_idx_lt: the returned index is in bounds *)
Lemma share_idx_lt : forall t tbl tbl' idx,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  idx < length tbl'.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H; simpl in H.
  all: try (eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
      end) l tbl)) eqn:E.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
        match ts with
        | [] => (acc, [])
        | t0 :: rest =>
            let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
            let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
            (acc2, idx0 :: idxs)
        end) l d0)) eqn:E3.
    eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto.
Qed.

(** share preserves old entries *)
Lemma share_nth_preserved : forall t tbl tbl' idx i,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  i < length tbl ->
  nth_error tbl' i = nth_error tbl i.
Proof.
  intros t tbl tbl' idx i Hs Hi.
  destruct (share_is_prefix t tbl tbl' idx Hs) as [ext ->].
  apply nth_error_app1. exact Hi.
Qed.

(** unfold is monotone in fuel *)
Lemma unfold_fuel_mono : forall tbl fuel1 fuel2 idx t,
  fuel1 <= fuel2 ->
  unfold tbl fuel1 idx = Some t ->
  unfold tbl fuel2 idx = Some t.
Proof.
  intros tbl.
  induction fuel1; intros fuel2 idx t Hle H.
  - simpl in H. discriminate.
  - destruct fuel2; [lia|].
    simpl in H. simpl.
    destruct (nth_error tbl idx) eqn:En; [|discriminate].
    rewrite En.
    destruct n.
    all: try exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto]. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto]. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto]. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto]. exact H.
    + revert H. generalize l.
      fix IHl 1. intros [|i ls].
      * simpl. auto.
      * simpl.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 i) eqn:Eui; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
          match l0 with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel1 i0, go l' with
                        | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                        | _, _ => None
                        end
          end) ls) eqn:Egs; [|discriminate].
        intros H.
        erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
        erewrite IHl; eauto.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
      revert H. generalize l.
      fix IHl 1. intros [|i ls].
      * simpl. auto.
      * simpl.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel1 i) eqn:Eui; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
          match l0 with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel1 i0, go l' with
                        | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                        | _, _ => None
                        end
          end) ls) eqn:Egs; [|discriminate].
        intros H.
        erewrite IHfuel1; [|lia|eauto].
        erewrite IHl; eauto.
Qed.

(** unfold works with extended table *)
Lemma unfold_tbl_mono : forall tbl ext fuel idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
  unfold (tbl ++ ext) fuel idx = Some t.
Proof.
  intros tbl ext.
  induction fuel; intros idx t H.
  - simpl in H. discriminate.
  - simpl in H. simpl.
    destruct (nth_error tbl idx) eqn:En; [|discriminate].
    erewrite nth_error_app1.
    2: { apply nth_error_Some. intro E. rewrite E in En. discriminate. }
    rewrite En.
    destruct n.
    all: try exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto. exact H.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto. exact H.
    + revert H. generalize l.
      fix IHl 1. intros [|i ls].
      * simpl. auto.
      * simpl.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) eqn:Eui; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
          match l0 with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
                        | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                        | _, _ => None
                        end
          end) ls) eqn:Egs; [|discriminate].
        intros H.
        erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHl; eauto.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n) eqn:E1; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:E2; [|discriminate].
      erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHfuel; eauto.
      revert H. generalize l.
      fix IHl 1. intros [|i ls].
      * simpl. auto.
      * simpl.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) eqn:Eui; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
          match l0 with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
                        | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                        | _, _ => None
                        end
          end) ls) eqn:Egs; [|discriminate].
        intros H.
        erewrite IHfuel; eauto. erewrite IHl; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Main round-trip lemma:
    Generalized: if share t tbl0 = (tbl1, idx), then
    unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel idx = Some t for any fuel >= length tbl1 *)

Lemma share_unfold_ext : forall t tbl0 tbl1 idx ext fuel,
  share t tbl0 = (tbl1, idx) ->
  fuel >= length tbl1 ->
  unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl0 tbl1 idx ext fuel Hs Hfuel; simpl in Hs.
  - (* tVar *)
    destruct fuel; [pose proof (intern_idx_lt _ _ _ _ Hs); lia|].
    simpl.
    erewrite nth_error_app1.
    2: { eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto. }
    erewrite intern_idx_correct; eauto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* tSort *)
    destruct fuel; [pose proof (intern_idx_lt _ _ _ _ Hs); lia|].
    simpl.
    erewrite nth_error_app1.
    2: { eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto. }
    erewrite intern_idx_correct; eauto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl0) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    pose proof (intern_idx_correct _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hidx.
    pose proof (intern_idx_lt _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hlt.
    pose proof (share_length_ge t1 tbl0 d n1 E1) as Hge1.
    pose proof (share_length_ge t2 d d0 n0 E2) as Hge2.
    pose proof (intern_length_ge _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hge3.
    destruct (share_is_prefix t2 d d0 n0 E2) as [e2 He2].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ Hs) as [e3 He3].
    destruct fuel; [lia|].
    simpl.
    erewrite nth_error_app1; [|exact Hlt].
    rewrite Hidx.
    (* unfold tbl1 ++ ext n a = Some t1 *)
    (* We have IHt1: share t1 tbl0 = (d, n1) => unfold (d ++ _) fuel n1 = Some t1 *)
    assert (unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel n1 = Some t1).
    { destruct (share_is_prefix t1 tbl0 d n1 E1) as [e1 He1].
      subst d. rewrite He3, He2 in *.
      rewrite <- app_assoc. rewrite <- app_assoc.
      eapply IHt1; eauto.
      rewrite He3 in Hfuel. rewrite He2 in Hfuel.
      rewrite !app_length in *. lia. }
    assert (unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel n0 = Some t2).
    { destruct (share_is_prefix t1 tbl0 d n1 E1) as [e1 He1].
      subst d. rewrite He3 in *.
      rewrite <- app_assoc.
      eapply IHt2; [exact E2|].
      rewrite He3 in Hfuel.
      rewrite !app_length in *. lia. }
    rewrite H, H0. reflexivity.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl0) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    pose proof (intern_idx_correct _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hidx.
    pose proof (intern_idx_lt _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hlt.
    pose proof (share_length_ge t1 tbl0 d n1 E1) as Hge1.
    pose proof (share_length_ge t2 d d0 n0 E2) as Hge2.
    destruct (share_is_prefix t1 tbl0 d n1 E1) as [e1 He1].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ Hs) as [e3 He3].
    destruct fuel; [lia|].
    simpl.
    erewrite nth_error_app1; [|exact Hlt].
    rewrite Hidx.
    assert (unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel n1 = Some t1).
    { subst d. rewrite He3 in *.
      destruct (share_is_prefix t2 d0 d0 n0 E2) as [e2 He2].
      rewrite <- app_assoc. rewrite <- app_assoc.
      eapply IHt1; eauto.
      rewrite He3 in Hfuel.
      rewrite !app_length in *. lia. }
    assert (unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel n0 = Some t2).
    { subst d. rewrite He3 in *.
      rewrite <- app_assoc.
      eapply IHt2; [exact E2|].

    pose proof (intern_idx_lt _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hlt.
    destruct (share_is_prefix t1 tbl0 d n1 E1) as [e1 He1].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ Hs) as [e3 He3].
    destruct fuel; [lia|].
    simpl.
    erewrite nth_error_app1; [|exact Hlt].
    rewrite Hidx.
    assert (unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel n1 = Some t1).
    { subst d. rewrite He3 in *.
      rewrite <- app_assoc. rewrite <- app_assoc.
      eapply IHt1; eauto.
      rewrite He3 in Hfuel. rewrite !app_length in *. lia. }
    assert (unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel n0 = Some t2).
    { subst d. rewrite He3 in *.
      rewrite <- app_assoc.
      eapply IHt2; [exact E2|].
      rewrite He3 in Hfuel. rewrite !app_length in *. lia. }
    rewrite H, H0. reflexivity.

    destruct (share_is_prefix t1 tbl0 d n1 E1) as [e1 He1].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ Hs) as [e3 He3].
    destruct fuel; [lia|].
    simpl.
    erewrite nth_error_app1; [|exact Hlt].
    rewrite Hidx.
    assert (unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel n1 = Some t1).
    { subst d. rewrite He3 in *.
      rewrite <- app_assoc. rewrite <- app_assoc.
      eapply IHt1; eauto.
      rewrite He3 in Hfuel. rewrite !app_length in *. lia. }
    assert (unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel n0 = Some t2).
    { subst d. rewrite He3 in *.
      rewrite <- app_assoc.
      eapply IHt2; [exact E2|].
      rewrite He3 in Hfuel. rewrite !app_length in *. lia. }
    rewrite H, H0. reflexivity.
  - (* tInd *)
    destruct fuel; [pose proof (intern_idx_lt _ _ _ _ Hs); lia|].
    simpl.
    erewrite nth_error_app1.
    2: { eapply intern_idx_lt; eauto. }
    erewrite intern_idx_correct; eauto.
    reflexivity.
  - (* tRoll *)
    set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in

    pose proof (intern_idx_lt _ _ _ _ Hs) as Hlt.
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ Hs) as [e_int He_int].
    destruct fuel; [lia|].
    simpl.
    erewrite nth_error_app1; [|exact Hlt].
    rewrite Hidx.
    (* Show all args unfold correctly *)
    assert (forall i ti, In i l0 -> In ti l ->
      unfold (tbl1 ++ ext) fuel i = Some ti).
    { admit. }
    (* Actually need: map (unfold (tbl1++ext) fuel) l0 = Some (map id l) *)
    (* This requires a stronger IH about the list processing *)
    admit.
  - (* tCase - similar *)
    admit.
Admitted.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem unfold_share : forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t.
Proof.
  intro t.
  destruct (share t []) eqn:E.
  rewrite <- app_nil_r at 1.
  eapply share_unfold_ext; eauto.
Admitted.

Theorem unfold_share_neg : ~ (forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt_neg : ~ (forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t)).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct : forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct_neg : ~ (forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t)).
Proof. Admitted.

(** share produces a prefix of the result table starting from the input table *)
Lemma share_is_prefix : forall t tbl tbl' idx,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  exists ext, tbl' = tbl ++ ext.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H; simpl in H.
  all: try (eapply intern_is_prefix; eauto; fail).

Let me check if this is a naming issue with the induction. In `share_length_ge`, we use `IHt : forall tbl tbl' idx, share a0 tbl = (tbl', idx) -> length tbl <= length tbl'` (for the `tRoll` case). But the `tRoll` case with `induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H` might not know that `IHt` applies to elements of `l`... 

Actually, the standard induction principle for `tm` doesn't give an IH for `tRoll`'s list argument. The standard `Inductive tm` with `tRoll (I c : nat) (args : list tm)` would generate a weak induction principle where `tRoll` only has `I : nat, c : nat, args : list tm` in scope but no IH for `args` elements.

    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.

But `share_length_ge a0` is what we're trying to prove! The element `a0` is from the list, and we'd need `share_length_ge` for it.

(** share_length_ge: share never shrinks the table *)
Lemma share_length_ge : forall t tbl tbl' idx,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  length tbl <= length tbl'.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H; simpl in H.
  all: try (eapply intern_length_ge; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.

  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  length tbl <= length tbl'.

  all: try (eapply intern_length_ge; eauto; fail).

    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt1; eauto.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply IHt2; eauto.
    eapply intern_length_ge; eauto.
  - (* tRoll *)
    set (go := (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=

      injection E as <- <-.

Qed.

```coq
Lemma share_length_ge_combined :
  (forall t tbl tbl' idx,
    share t tbl = (tbl', idx) -> length tbl <= length tbl') /\
  (forall (args : list tm) tbl tbl' idxs,
    (fix go ts acc := ...) args tbl = (tbl', idxs) -> length tbl <= length tbl').
```

And prove it by `induction` on both `t` and the list simultaneously using the conjunction. But `split` would separate them.

Actually the cleanest Coq approach: just add a helper lemma before `share_length_ge`:

```coq
Lemma share_list_length_ge : forall (P : forall t tbl tbl' idx, share t tbl = (tbl', idx) -> length tbl <= length tbl'),
  forall args tbl tbl' idxs, go args tbl = (tbl', idxs) -> length tbl <= length tbl'.
```

This takes `P` as a parameter (the "external" hypothesis about single terms). Then:

```coq

  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) -> length tbl <= length tbl'.
Proof.
  induction t.
  ...

    eapply share_list_length_ge with (P := share_length_ge).
```

But this is circular with `share_length_ge` referring to itself!

OK, let me just use the `Scheme` approach to get a proper mutual induction:

(** Auxiliary lemma: list processing in share grows the table *)
Lemma share_list_aux :
  (forall t tbl tbl' idx, share t tbl = (tbl', idx) -> length tbl <= length tbl') ->
  forall (ts : list tm) tbl tbl' idxs,
  (fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
     match ts0 with
     | [] => (acc, [])
     | t0 :: rest =>
         let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
         let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
         (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
     end) ts tbl = (tbl', idxs) ->
  length tbl <= length tbl'.
Proof.
  intro Ht.
  induction ts as [|a0 ts IHts]; intros tbl tbl' idxs H; simpl in H.
  - injection H as <- <-. lia.
  - destruct (share a0 tbl) eqn:E1.
    destruct (((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
     match ts0 with
     | [] => (acc, [])
     | t0 :: rest =>
         let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
         let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
         (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
     end) ts d)) eqn:E2.
    injection H as <- <-.
    eapply Nat.le_trans. eapply Ht; eauto.
    eapply IHts; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma share_list_is_prefix_aux :
  (forall t tbl tbl' idx, share t tbl = (tbl', idx) -> exists ext, tbl' = tbl ++ ext) ->
  forall (ts : list tm) tbl tbl' idxs,
  (fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
     match ts0 with
     | [] => (acc, [])
     | t0 :: rest =>
         let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
         let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
         (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
     end) ts tbl = (tbl', idxs) ->
  exists ext, tbl' = tbl ++ ext.
Proof.
  intro Ht.
  induction ts as [|a0 ts IHts]; intros tbl tbl' idxs H; simpl in H.
  - injection H as <- <-. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity.
  - destruct (share a0 tbl) eqn:E1.
    destruct (((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
     match ts0 with
     | [] => (acc, [])
     | t0 :: rest =>
         let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
         let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
         (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
     end) ts d)) eqn:E2.
    injection H as <- <-.
    destruct (Ht a0 tbl d n E1) as [e1 ->].
    destruct (IHts (tbl ++ e1) d0 l E2) as [e2 ->].
    exists (e1 ++ e2). rewrite app_assoc. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** share produces a prefix of the result table starting from the input table *)
Lemma share_is_prefix : forall t tbl tbl' idx,
  share t tbl = (tbl', idx) ->
  exists ext, tbl' = tbl ++ ext.
Proof.
  induction t; intros tbl tbl' idx H; simpl in H.
  all: try (eapply intern_is_prefix; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (IHt1 _ _ _ E1) as [e1 ->].
    destruct (IHt2 _ _ _ E2) as [e2 ->].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ H) as [e3 ->].
    exists (e1 ++ e2 ++ e3). rewrite !app_assoc. reflexivity.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 d) eqn:E2.
    destruct (IHt1 _ _ _ E1) as [e1 ->].
    destruct (IHt2 _ _ _ E2) as [e2 ->].
    destruct (intern_is_prefix _ _ _ _ H) as [e3 ->].
